data.speaker: Ember
data.text: Hey! You look like someone who knows the value of a good trade.

data.speaker: Ember
data.text: The Exchange Booth over there connects to the Ather Exchange. Buy low, sell high — that's the game.

data.speaker: Ember
data.text: Prices shift based on supply. Sell too much of one thing and the price drops. Market forces, you know?
